rationale: The citing paper’s core analyses rely on interaction terms (e.g., risk aversion × NFCC and related boundary-condition interactions) in regressions across field and experiments. The cited paper is a methodological tutorial specifically on testing and interpreting simple effects in moderated regression (spotlight/floodlight/Johnson-Neyman), which is a plausible analytic source for those central tests. Given this method alignment, this is not clearly an incidental mention.
